sys_script_include.description: This script contains the Out of Office functionality for DTech Apps 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011562- Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" filter criteria SHOULD display Task (IS) Active 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011556 - Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" should NOT display to the ALL user without any existing OOO schedules 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011555 - Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" should NOT display the Draft task 2.8.1 | 2022-12-20| raj | STRY0130630 - Banner Notification & Task List- My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office) 2.8.1 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office
sys_script_include.name: Out_of_Office
